title: Helps Their Friends
summary: You love your friends and help them out of any difficulty, no matter what.
tiers: Tier 3: Buddy System or Skill With Attacks
Tier 6: Deep Consideration or Skill With Defense
gm_intrusions: Others sometimes have ulterior motives. The law takes an undue interest. Even when everything goes right, repercussions follow.
text: You love your friends and help them out of any difficulty, no matter what. Type Swap Option: Advice From a Friend
